channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: the Codex x @skybysoftware acquisition may have been one of the best @openai deals made in the last ...
item.description:
the Codex x @skybysoftware acquisition may have been one of the best @openai deals made in the last year.
I've been waiting for "real" computer use since @romainhuet demoed the ChatGPT App with 4o Vision at AIEWF 2024... and only now it's really, actually rolling out in a usable fashion.
--- @swyx | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 248
item.author: @swyx

item.title:
We're launching the Anthropic STEM Fellows Program.
AI will accelerate progress in science and eng...
item.description:
We're launching the Anthropic STEM Fellows Program.
AI will accelerate progress in science and engineering. We're looking for experts across these fields to work alongside our research teams on specific projects over a few months.
Learn more and apply: https://t.co/MoF60j53pX
--- @AnthropicAI | ❤️ 139 | 🔁 19 | 💬 21 | 👁 4520
item.author: @AnthropicAI

item.title:

--- @ollama | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 257
item.author: @ollama

item.title:
Kimi K2.6 raises the bar for open-source models.
🦙 available on Ollama's cloud!
Try it with Open...
item.description:
Kimi K2.6 raises the bar for open-source models.
🦙 available on Ollama's cloud!
Try it with OpenClaw: ollama launch openclaw --model kimi-k2.6:cloud
Try it with Hermes Agent: ollama launch hermes --model kimi-k2.6:cloud
Try it with Claude Code: ollama launch claude --model kimi-k2.6:cloud
more integrations 🧵
--- @ollama | ❤️ 26 | 🔁 5 | 💬 8 | 👁 862
item.author: @ollama

item.title: Welcome back Ben! Can’t wait to see what you build!
item.author: @joshwoodward

item.title: "In the next 12-24 months, we're going to see massive shedding of staff, and then a massive reh...
item.author: @lennysan

item.title:
🧭 gog 0.13 is out!
Gmail forwarding with notes + attachments, autoreplies, full-body search, Markdo...
item.description:
🧭 gog 0.13 is out!
Gmail forwarding with notes + attachments, autoreplies, full-body search, Markdown uploads to Google Docs, rendered Slides thumbnails, Sheets chart editing, secondary calendars, commenter-only Drive shares, and safer no-send controls. https://t.co/7nQoJaa0Ti
--- @steipete | ❤️ 97 | 🔁 5 | 💬 7 | 👁 5364
item.author: @steipete
